info.title: Azure DevOps REST API
info.description: Azure DevOps REST API covering Projects, Work Items, Git, Builds, Pipelines, and Releases.

get.description: Get all projects in the organization that the authenticated user has access to.

parameters.name: stateFilter
parameters.description: Filter on team projects in a specific team project state.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Pointer that shows how many projects already been fetched.

post.description: Queues a project to be created. Use the GetOperation to periodically check for create project status.

get.description: Get project with the specified id or name, optionally including capabilities.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID or project name.

parameters.name: includeCapabilities
parameters.description: Include capabilities (such as source control) in the team project result (default: false).

parameters.name: includeHistory
parameters.description: Search within renamed projects (that had such name in the past).

patch.description: Update an existing project's name, description, or other properties.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

delete.description: Queues a project to be deleted.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The work item ID.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of requested fields.

parameters.name: asOf
parameters.description: AsOf UTC date time string.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The expand parameters for work item attributes.

delete.description: Deletes the specified work item, moving it to the recycle bin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The work item ID.

parameters.name: destroy
parameters.description: Optional parameter, if set to true, the work item is permanently deleted.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The work item ID.

parameters.name: bypassRules
parameters.description: Do not enforce the work item type rules on this update.

parameters.name: suppressNotifications
parameters.description: Do not fire any notifications for this change.

get.description: Returns a list of work items (Maximum 200).

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of requested work item IDs (maximum 200).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of requested fields.

parameters.name: asOf
parameters.description: AsOf UTC date time string.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The expand parameters for work item attributes.

parameters.name: errorPolicy
parameters.description: The flag to control error policy in a bulk get work items request.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The work item type of the work item to create.

parameters.name: validateOnly
parameters.description: Indicate if you only want to validate the changes without saving the work item.

parameters.name: bypassRules
parameters.description: Do not enforce the work item type rules on this update.

parameters.name: suppressNotifications
parameters.description: Do not fire any notifications for this change.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The expand parameters for work item attributes.

parameters.name: includeLinks
parameters.description: True to include reference links. The default value is false.

parameters.name: includeAllUrls
parameters.description: True to include all remote URLs. The default value is false.

parameters.name: includeHidden
parameters.description: True to include hidden repositories. The default value is false.

post.description: Create a git repository in a team project.

parameters.name: sourceRef
parameters.description: Specify the source refs to use while creating a fork repo.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The name or ID of the repository.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The ID of the repository.

get.description: Retrieve all pull requests matching a specified criteria.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The repository ID of the pull request's target branch.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.status
parameters.description: If set, search for pull requests that are in this state. Defaults to Active if unset.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.sourceRefName
parameters.description: If set, search for pull requests from this branch.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.targetRefName
parameters.description: If set, search for pull requests into this branch.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.creatorId
parameters.description: If set, search for pull requests that were created by this identity.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.reviewerId
parameters.description: If set, search for pull requests that have this identity as a reviewer.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of pull requests to retrieve.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of pull requests to ignore.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The repository ID of the pull request's target branch.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The repository ID of the pull request's target branch.

parameters.name: pullRequestId
parameters.description: The ID of the pull request to retrieve.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The repository ID of the pull request's target branch.

parameters.name: pullRequestId
parameters.description: ID of the pull request to update.

get.description: Retrieve git commits for a repository.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The ID or friendly name of the repository.

parameters.name: searchCriteria.itemVersion.version
parameters.description: Version string identifier (name of tag/branch, SHA1 of commit).

parameters.name: searchCriteria.itemVersion.versionType
parameters.description: Version type (branch, tag, or commit).

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to retrieve.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of entries to skip.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The ID or friendly name of the repository.

parameters.name: commitId
parameters.description: The ID of the commit.

get.description: Retrieve statistics about all branches within a repository.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: The name or ID of the repository.

parameters.name: definitions
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of definition IDs.

parameters.name: statusFilter
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that match this status.

parameters.name: resultFilter
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that match this result.

parameters.name: branchName
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that built this branch.

parameters.name: repositoryId
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that built from this repository.

parameters.name: repositoryType
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that built from repositories of this type.

parameters.name: requestedFor
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds requested for the specified user.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The maximum number of builds to return.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: A continuation token, returned by a previous call to this method.

parameters.name: queryOrder
parameters.description: The order in which builds should be returned.

parameters.name: minTime
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that finished/started/queued after this date.

parameters.name: maxTime
parameters.description: If specified, filters to builds that finished/started/queued before this date.

parameters.name: buildIds
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list that specifies the IDs of builds to retrieve.

parameters.name: tagFilters
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of tags.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: Optional definition id to queue a build without a body. Ignored if there's a valid body.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The build ID.

get.description: Gets a list of build definitions.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: If specified, filters to definitions whose names match this pattern.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The maximum number of definitions to return.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: If specified, filters to definitions under this folder.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The ID of the definition.

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: The revision number to retrieve.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The ID of the definition.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The ID of the definition.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: A sort expression. Defaults to "name asc".

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The maximum number of pipelines to return.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: A continuation token from a previous request.

get.description: Gets a pipeline, optionally at the specified version.

parameters.name: pipelineId
parameters.description: The pipeline ID.

parameters.name: pipelineVersion
parameters.description: The pipeline version.

get.description: Gets top 10000 runs for a particular pipeline.

parameters.name: pipelineId
parameters.description: The pipeline ID.

parameters.name: pipelineId
parameters.description: The pipeline ID.

parameters.name: pipelineVersion
parameters.description: The pipeline version.

get.description: Gets a run for a particular pipeline.

parameters.name: pipelineId
parameters.description: The pipeline ID.

parameters.name: runId
parameters.description: The run ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: Filter by release definition ID.

parameters.name: statusFilter
parameters.description: Filter by release status.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of releases to get (default: 50).

parameters.name: queryOrder
parameters.description: Sort order (default: descending).

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Pagination token.

parameters.name: minCreatedTime
parameters.description: Filter releases created after this time.

parameters.name: maxCreatedTime
parameters.description: Filter releases created before this time.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: Filter by release name (partial match).

parameters.name: sourceBranchFilter
parameters.description: Filter by source branch.

parameters.name: tagFilter
parameters.description: Comma-delimited list of tags.

parameters.name: releaseId
parameters.description: The release ID.

parameters.name: releaseId
parameters.description: The release ID.

get.description: Get a list of release definitions.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: Get release definitions with names containing searchText.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The properties that should be expanded in the list of release definitions.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of release definitions to get.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Gets the release definitions after the continuation token provided.

parameters.name: queryOrder
parameters.description: Gets the results in the defined order.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Gets the release definitions under the specified path.

parameters.name: isExactNameMatch
parameters.description: true to get the release definitions with exact match as specified in searchText.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The release definition ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The release definition ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The release definition ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: Filter by release definition ID.

parameters.name: definitionEnvironmentId
parameters.description: Filter by definition environment ID.

parameters.name: deploymentStatus
parameters.description: Filter by deployment status.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of deployments to return.

parameters.name: queryOrder
parameters.description: Sort order.

parameters.name: minStartedTime
parameters.description: Filter deployments that started after this time.

parameters.name: maxStartedTime
parameters.description: Filter deployments that started before this time.

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication with Personal Access Token (PAT). Use an empty string for the username and the PAT as the password.

scopes.vso.profile: Read your profile, accounts, collections, projects, teams.
scopes.vso.project_manage: Create, read, update, and delete projects and teams.
scopes.vso.work: Read work items, queries, boards, area and iterations paths.
scopes.vso.work_write: Read, create, and update work items and queries.
scopes.vso.code: Read source code and metadata about commits, changesets, branches.
scopes.vso.code_manage: Read, update, and delete source code, manage code repositories.
scopes.vso.build: Read build artifacts, definitions, and requests.
scopes.vso.build_execute: Access build artifacts, queue builds, update build properties.
scopes.vso.release: Read release artifacts, definitions, and environments.
scopes.vso.release_manage: Read, update, and delete release definitions and releases.

apiVersion.name: api-version
apiVersion.description: Version of the API to use. This should be set to '7.1'.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. Invalid parameters or malformed request body.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

NotFound.description: Not found. The specified resource does not exist.

ReferenceLinks.description: The class to represent a collection of REST reference links.

TeamProjectReference.description: Represents a shallow reference to a TeamProject.

JsonPatchDocument.description: The JSON model for JSON Patch Operations.

GitPullRequest.description: Represents all the data associated with a pull request.

vote.description: Vote on a pull request: 10=approved, 5=approved with suggestions, 0=no vote, -5=waiting for author, -10=rejected.

GitCommitRef.description: Provides properties that describe a Git commit.

BuildRepository.description: Represents a repository used by a build definition.

DefinitionReference.description: Represents a reference to a build definition.

previewRun.description: If true, don't actually create a new run. Instead, return the final YAML document after parsing templates.

yamlOverride.description: If you use the preview run option, you may optionally supply different YAML.

tags.name: Git
tags.description: Git API - Repositories, Pull Requests, Commits
